channel.title: nas on Ahmad Jamali
channel.description: Recent content in nas on Ahmad Jamali

item.title: Mount the Shared Folders From Synology on Your Ubuntu 18.04 LTS Server
item.description: Have you ever wondered how you can share your folders on your Synology with your linux server for extra storage? Well, I have a Plex server at home and I wanted to rebuild this server from scratch but had no where to put my media. I decided to connect my Synology NAS to my Plex server and use it as a temporary storage. In this guide, I will show you how I managed to do this and how you can achieve the same result.
